title: Nauru Economic and Climate Resilience Citizenship (Amendment) Act 2026
text:
REPUBLIC OF NAURU 
NAURU ECONOMIC AND CLIMATE 
RESILIENCE CITIZENSHIP (AMENDMENT) ACT 
2026 
_____________________________ 
No. 13 of 2026 
______________________________ 
 
An Act to amend the Nauru Economic and Climate Resilience Citizenship Act 2024 
and for other related purposes. 
 
Certified: 31 March 2026 
Table of Provisions 
1 Short title ....................................................................................................................................... 2 
2 Commencement ............................................................................................................................ 2 
3 Amendment of the Nauru Economic and Climate Resilience Citizenship Act 2024 ...................... 2 
4 Amendment of Section 3 ............................................................................................................... 2 
5 Amendment of Section 5 ............................................................................................................... 2 
6 Consequential amendments ......................................................................................................... 2

2 
 
Enacted by the Parliament of Nauru as follows: 
1 Short title 
This Act may be cited as the Nauru Economic and Climate Resilience Citizenship 
(Amendment) Act 2026. 
2 Commencement 
This Act commences on the date it is certified by the Speaker. 
3 Amendment of the Nauru Economic and Climate Resilience Citizenship Act 
2024 
The Nauru Economic and Climate Resilience Citizenship Act 2024 is amended 
by the provisions of this Act. 
4 Amendment of Section 3 
Section 3 is amended in the definition of ‘Minister’ by deleting ‘Justice and Border 
Control’ and substituting with ‘Nauru Economic and Climate Resilience Citizenship 
Program Office’. 
5 Amendment of Section 5 
Section 5(2) is deleted and substituted with: 
‘(2) Where the Minister is satisfied that the requirements of the Act have not been 
met, he or she shall not grant citizenship to a person applying for citizenship 
under this Act. 
(3) A person shall not be granted citizenship where he or she has been involved 
in any manner whatsoever on matters contained in Section 23(1)(b).’. 
6 Consequential amendments 
(1) Regulation 16(5) and (6) of the Nauru Economic and Climate Resilience 
Citizenship Regulations 2024 is deleted and substituted as follows: 
‘(5) For applications which were not endorsed by the Registrar, the Registrar 
shall submit this to the Minister to review the recommendation and 
non-endorsement and direct the Registrar in writing to notify the Program 
Office that the application has been refused. 
(6) Where the Minister has made a decision under subregulation (5), the 
Registrar shall for the purpose of Section 5(2) of the Act, inform the 
Program Office that the Minister has rejected the application for 
citizenship.’. 
(2) Regulation 16(9) is amended by deleting the ‘the Act’ where second 
occurring and substitute with ‘these Regulations’.
